case_studies.title: Regional Card Issuer Achieves PCI DSS Compliance Across Legacy Platforms
case_studies.summary: Helped a regional credit card issuer modernize network segmentation and logging to achieve PCI DSS compliance across legacy mainframe and cloud workloads.
case_studies.results: Reduced cardholder data environment scope by 40%, passed ROC on first attempt, and eliminated 15 critical audit findings.

case_studies.title: Fintech Lender Consolidates PCI DSS Controls Across Multi-Cloud
case_studies.summary: Partnered with a high-growth fintech lender to rationalize PCI DSS controls across AWS and Azure environments.
case_studies.results: Cut duplicated controls by 30%, achieved a clean PCI DSS assessment, and improved incident response time by 45%.

case_studies.title: Payment Processor Streamlines PCI DSS Program With Continuous Monitoring
case_studies.summary: Implemented centralized logging, file integrity monitoring, and continuous vulnerability scanning for a global payment processor.
case_studies.results: Reduced time to detect cardholder data exposure from days to minutes and consistently maintained PCI DSS readiness year-round.

case_studies.title: B2B SaaS Platform Completes SOC 2 Type II in Under Six Months
case_studies.summary: Guided a B2B SaaS startup through SOC 2 readiness, control implementation, and Type II audit coordination.
case_studies.results: Passed SOC 2 Type II with no major exceptions and shortened enterprise sales cycles by 25%.

case_studies.title: Healthcare SaaS Vendor Aligns SOC 2 Controls With HIPAA
case_studies.summary: Mapped SOC 2 trust services criteria to HIPAA requirements for a cloud-based electronic health record provider.
case_studies.results: Achieved SOC 2 Type II attestation and closed 22 security gaps identified in prior HIPAA assessments.

case_studies.title: Global Manufacturer Establishes ISO 27001 ISMS
case_studies.summary: Developed and implemented an enterprise-wide ISMS aligned to ISO 27001 for a multinational manufacturer.
case_studies.results: Reduced unplanned downtime from security incidents by 35% and achieved ISO 27001 certification at three major sites.

case_studies.title: European Analytics Provider Reduces GDPR Risk Exposure
case_studies.summary: Completed a GDPR data mapping, DPIA program, and vendor risk assessment for an EU-based analytics platform.
case_studies.results: Lowered identified high-risk processing activities by 60% and passed supervisory authority review without fines.

case_studies.title: Hospital Network Strengthens HIPAA Security Rule Compliance
case_studies.summary: Performed a comprehensive HIPAA security risk analysis and remediation roadmap for a regional hospital network.
case_studies.results: Resolved 18 critical findings, improved audit log review coverage to 95%, and avoided penalties during OCR inquiry.

case_studies.title: EdTech Platform Earns First SOC 2 Report to Win District Contracts
case_studies.summary: Supported an EdTech vendor in documenting controls, formalizing change management, and preparing for SOC 2.
case_studies.results: Completed SOC 2 Type I and used the report to win six new school district contracts.

case_studies.title: E-commerce Retailer Outsources 24/7 Security Monitoring
case_studies.summary: Deployed managed security monitoring to protect an e-commerce platform handling seasonal traffic spikes.
case_studies.results: Detected and contained three attempted account takeover campaigns with no confirmed fraud losses.

case_studies.title: Digital Bank Aligns ISO 27001 With PCI DSS and SOC 2
case_studies.summary: Implemented an integrated control framework combining ISO 27001, PCI DSS, and SOC 2 for a digital-only bank.
case_studies.results: Reduced audit preparation effort by 40% and consolidated 120 overlapping controls.

case_studies.title: Government Agency Adopts NIST Cybersecurity Framework
case_studies.summary: Helped a state agency baseline its security posture against the NIST Cybersecurity Framework and plan improvements.
case_studies.results: Improved overall maturity from Partial to Risk Informed and secured funding for priority remediation projects.

compliance_frameworks.name: ISO 27001 Information Security Management
compliance_frameworks.description: International standard that specifies the requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an information security management system (ISMS).

compliance_frameworks.name: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
compliance_frameworks.description: Attestation standard for service organizations focusing on security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.

compliance_frameworks.name: PCI DSS Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
compliance_frameworks.description: Industry standard for organizations that store, process, or transmit cardholder data, defining security controls to protect payment information.

compliance_frameworks.name: HIPAA Security and Privacy Rules
compliance_frameworks.description: U.S. healthcare regulations governing the protection of electronic protected health information (ePHI).

compliance_frameworks.name: EU General Data Protection Regulation
compliance_frameworks.description: European Union regulation on data protection and privacy for individuals within the EU and the European Economic Area.

compliance_frameworks.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
compliance_frameworks.description: Guidance developed by NIST for organizations to manage and reduce cybersecurity risk using the Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, and Recover functions.

policy_library_plans.name: Basic
policy_library_plans.description: Entry-level access to core security and compliance policy templates for small teams.

policy_library_plans.name: Standard
policy_library_plans.description: Includes full access to the policy library with version history and collaboration features.

policy_library_plans.name: Pro
policy_library_plans.description: Advanced plan with extended template sets, approval workflows, and integration options.

policy_library_plans.name: Enterprise
policy_library_plans.description: Unlimited users, multi-region support, and dedicated success manager for large organizations.

services.name: SOC 2 Compliance
services.shortDescription: End-to-end SOC 2 readiness, remediation, and audit support for cloud-first organizations.
services.longDescription: Our SOC 2 Compliance service helps SaaS and cloud service providers plan, implement, and evidence the controls required for SOC 2 Type I and Type II reports. From initial gap assessment through auditor coordination, we provide practical guidance, security engineering support, and documentation templates tailored to your environment.

services.name: Managed Security Monitoring
services.shortDescription: 24/7 managed detection and response for endpoints, cloud, and network infrastructure.
services.longDescription: Our Managed Security Monitoring service provides continuous threat detection, investigation, and response across your endpoints, servers, cloud accounts, and network perimeter. We combine SIEM, EDR, and threat intelligence with an experienced analyst team to contain threats before they become incidents.

services.name: Penetration Testing
services.shortDescription: Application, network, and cloud penetration testing with actionable remediation guidance.
services.longDescription: Our Penetration Testing services simulate real-world attacks against your web applications, APIs, internal networks, and cloud environments. Engagements include collaborative scoping, thorough testing by senior consultants, and prioritized remediation guidance to help your teams fix issues quickly.

services.name: Security & Compliance Advisory
services.shortDescription: Strategic advisory for security programs, risk management, and regulatory alignment.
services.longDescription: Our advisory consultants work with security and risk leaders to define security strategies, build pragmatic roadmaps, and align security programs with frameworks such as ISO 27001, NIST CSF, and HITRUST. Engagements can include virtual CISO services, board reporting, and program maturity assessments.

training_courses.title: Security Awareness Essentials for Employees
training_courses.shortDescription: Foundational overview of phishing, passwords, and safe browsing for all staff.

training_courses.title: Recognizing Phishing and Social Engineering
training_courses.shortDescription: Practical tips and real-world examples to help employees spot and report phishing attacks.

training_courses.title: Secure Remote Work Basics

training_courses.title: Security Awareness Express (30-Minute Primer)
training_courses.shortDescription: Fast-paced, high-impact security awareness course for busy teams.

training_courses.title: Concientización en Seguridad para Empleados

training_courses.title: Web Application Security Fundamentals
training_courses.shortDescription: Introduces common web vulnerabilities such as XSS, SQL injection, and access control issues.

training_courses.title: Network Penetration Testing Basics
training_courses.shortDescription: Covers the methodology and tooling used for internal and external network penetration tests.

training_courses.title: SOC 2 Overview for SaaS Companies
training_courses.shortDescription: Explains SOC 2 concepts, trust services criteria, and common control examples.

training_courses.title: ISO 27001: Introduction to ISMS
training_courses.shortDescription: Overview of ISO 27001 requirements, scope, and key documentation.

training_courses.title: GDPR Essentials for Staff
training_courses.shortDescription: Covers GDPR fundamentals and what they mean for day-to-day work with personal data.

training_courses.title: Phishing Simulation Coaching for Managers
training_courses.shortDescription: Helps managers interpret phishing simulation results and coach their teams.

training_courses.title: Sicherheitsbewusstsein am Arbeitsplatz
training_courses.shortDescription: Einführung in grundlegende Sicherheits- und Datenschutzthemen für Mitarbeitende.

training_courses.title: Sensibilisation à la sécurité pour les employés
training_courses.shortDescription: Notions de base sur la cybersécurité et les bonnes pratiques pour tous les employés.

compliance_services.name: ISO 27001 gap analysis
compliance_services.description: Structured review of your current security controls and documentation against ISO 27001 requirements, including a prioritized remediation roadmap.

compliance_services.name: SOC 2 readiness assessment
compliance_services.description: Assessment of your environment against SOC 2 trust services criteria with a readiness score and remediation plan for Type I/II audits.

compliance_services.name: PCI DSS scope definition and segmentation review
compliance_services.description: Workshops and technical reviews to define and minimize your PCI DSS cardholder data environment through effective segmentation.

compliance_services.name: HIPAA security risk analysis
compliance_services.description: Comprehensive HIPAA Security Rule risk analysis covering ePHI systems, controls, and administrative safeguards.

compliance_services.name: GDPR data inventory and mapping
compliance_services.description: End-to-end inventory of personal data, data flows, and processing activities to support GDPR compliance and DPIAs.

compliance_services.name: Security policy development
compliance_services.description: Creation or refresh of your core security policies, standards, and procedures aligned with leading frameworks.

compliance_services.name: Incident response plan and playbook development
compliance_services.description: Development of an actionable incident response plan, communication templates, and technical playbooks.

compliance_services.name: Third-party vendor risk management program
compliance_services.description: Design and rollout of a scalable third-party risk management process, including questionnaires and tiering model.

compliance_services.name: Virtual CISO advisory retainer
compliance_services.description: Ongoing executive-level security and compliance guidance for organizations without a full-time CISO.

compliance_services.name: ISO 27001 staff awareness (half-day)
compliance_services.description: Instructor-led half-day training for employees on ISO 27001 principles, roles, and day-to-day responsibilities.

compliance_services.name: ISO 27001 internal auditor training
compliance_services.description: Two-day training for internal auditors covering ISO 27001 clauses, control testing techniques, and reporting.

compliance_services.name: SOC 2 control owner training
compliance_services.description: Workshop for control owners on evidence collection, control operation, and preparing for SOC 2 audits.

compliance_services.name: Enterprise phishing awareness program
compliance_services.description: Program design and quarterly training to reduce phishing click rates across the organization.

compliance_services.name: Managed vulnerability scanning
compliance_services.description: Continuous external and internal vulnerability scanning with monthly reports and remediation guidance.

compliance_services.name: Continuous compliance monitoring
compliance_services.description: Ongoing review of control performance, evidence collection, and dashboarding to stay audit-ready.

compliance_services.name: SIEM use case and alert tuning
compliance_services.description: Development and tuning of SIEM detection use cases, correlation rules, and alert workflows.

managed_security_plans.name: Essentials (up to 25 endpoints)
managed_security_plans.shortDescription: Entry-level managed security monitoring for small teams during business hours.
managed_security_plans.detailedDescription: Includes log collection from core systems, basic correlation rules, and incident notifications during local business hours.

managed_security_plans.name: Growth (50–199 endpoints, business hours)
managed_security_plans.shortDescription: Monitoring for growing organizations that need coverage across offices and cloud workloads.
managed_security_plans.detailedDescription: Adds expanded data sources, ticketing integration, and guided incident response during extended business hours.

managed_security_plans.name: Extended (50–199 endpoints, extended hours)
managed_security_plans.shortDescription: Extended business-hours monitoring for organizations with multiple time zones.
managed_security_plans.detailedDescription: Provides monitoring coverage across extended hours on weekdays, plus on-call escalation for high-severity events.

managed_security_plans.name: 24/7 Monitoring (50–199 endpoints)
managed_security_plans.shortDescription: Round-the-clock managed detection and response for growing organizations.
managed_security_plans.detailedDescription: Provides 24/7 SOC monitoring, managed detections, and guided response across endpoints, servers, and cloud infrastructure.

managed_security_plans.name: 24/7 Monitoring (200+ endpoints)
managed_security_plans.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade 24/7 monitoring for larger, distributed environments.
managed_security_plans.detailedDescription: Includes 24/7 SOC coverage, custom detection engineering, and quarterly executive reporting for complex environments.

managed_security_plans.name: Cloud-only monitoring (up to 50 workloads)
managed_security_plans.shortDescription: Monitoring focused on AWS, Azure, and GCP accounts for smaller cloud-native teams.
managed_security_plans.detailedDescription: Collects and analyzes cloud-native logs, configuration changes, and identity events with tailored detections for cloud threats.
